client.name: Amal Joseph
client.label: Junior accountant and finance operations candidate

core_positioning.notes: Best fit is Junior Accountant, Accounts Payable, Accounts Receivable, Record-to-Report, reconciliation, finance operations, and analyst-track SSC / GBS roles in English-speaking environments in Warsaw. Secondary fit includes junior audit, assurance support, internal audit, compliance, and banking-operations roles where his MSc Finance (Audit & Control) and strong academic record can compensate for limited work experience. Avoid positioning him for tool-screened roles requiring strong SAP, Power BI, SQL, or Polish-language fluency until further verified evidence exists. Work authorization should be checked carefully before application because the source material contains both TRC wording and separate notes about pending-status constraints.

summary_base: Junior accountant and finance graduate with around 1.5 years of experience across bookkeeping, journal entries, account reconciliation, AP/AR support, statutory filing, payroll support, and month-end close in an international education-services company in India.

Strongest evidence includes maintaining on-time statutory filing across GST, TDS, and PF deadlines, supporting daily transaction posting and ledger updates, and building finance operations credibility alongside an MSc in Finance (Audit & Control) completed in Warsaw with a 4.24/5.0 GPA.

Best positioned for Junior Accountant, finance operations, SSC / GBS accounting, reconciliation, audit-support, and analyst-track roles where accuracy, compliance discipline, and English fluency matter more than deep local-market experience.

experience.company: Santa Monica Study Abroad Pvt Ltd
experience.summary: Accounting role in an international education-services company supporting bookkeeping, AP/AR, reconciliations, statutory compliance, payroll support, and close-cycle activities.
highlights: **Recorded and posted 50+ daily financial transactions (est.)** including journal entries, ledger updates, and account classifications across multi-department operations, maintaining zero posting backlog according to source claims.

**Supported month-end and year-end close across 3–5 departmental cost centres (est.)** and delivered reconciled financial information for senior management review on schedule according to source wording.
**Processed AP/AR workflows for 40+ vendors and clients (est.)** while tracking outstanding balances and supporting timely collection follow-up across the portfolio.

**Maintained on-time statutory filing across GST, TDS, and PF deadlines (est.)** through documentation preparation and compliance tracking; zero-penalty wording should be verified before final-facing use.
**Supported payroll processing and reimbursements for 50+ employees (est.)** and coordinated documentation for internal review and external statutory audit activity.

experience.company: Santa Monica Study Abroad Pvt Ltd
experience.summary: Internship supporting financial statement preparation, ledger reconciliation, audit documentation, reporting support, and ERP-based finance operations.
highlights: **Prepared financial statements and ledger reconciliations** supporting monthly and quarterly reporting cycles under senior-accountant supervision.
**Compiled audit documentation across departmental cost centres (est.)** contributing to budget tracking, expense monitoring, and variance-analysis support for management review.
**Built working proficiency in SAP ERP and Excel** for data entry, invoice processing, and reconciliation workflows that became part of the subsequent full-time role.
